## Goal

What should LazRibbon be able to do?

## Use case

Describe the application scenario that needs this feature.

## Proposed behavior

Describe the API, design-time behavior or visual behavior you expect.

## Compatibility

Should this preserve existing `.lfm` files and runtime behavior?

## Additional context

Add screenshots, links or examples if useful.
